title: Planned power outage: Church Street, Denneoord
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for Church Street in Denneoord on Monday 18 March from 09:00 to 16:30 for alterations to the electrical mains.

Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period.


> Should circumstances prevent the work being carried out during the abovementioned period; the work will be done on Monday 25 March from 09:00 to 16:30.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
